ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARIBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE, N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PAVOLOTSKY, LEONID Y $5,872.03 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,092.03, SEE SCANNED DOC
